short_description_of_the_course.label: Short Description of the Course
short_description_of_the_course.value:
To introduce the structure and function of computer systems, in particular:
To introduce the concept of representation of data.
To provide a general understanding of what computers are and how they work.
To provide background helpful for better understanding the behaviour of programming languages, compilers, and operating systems.
To convey understanding of descriptions of computer systems and projections of future trends.

timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.label: Timetable and length and frequency of teaching sessions
timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.value: Two one-hour lectures, one-hour tutorial, one-hour lab session per week.

course_aims.label: Course Aims
course_aims.value:
To introduce the structure and function of computer systems, in particular:
To introduce the concept of representation of data.
To provide a general understanding of what computers are and how they work.
To provide background helpful for better understanding the behaviour of programming languages, compilers, and operating systems.
To convey understanding of descriptions of computer systems and projections of future trends.

intended_learning_outcomes_of_course.label: Intended Learning Outcomes of Course

formative_assessment_feedback.label: Formative Assessment & Feedback
formative_assessment_feedback.value: Written feedback on assessed coursework; verbal feedback during class, tutorial and lab discussions.
